name: Weekly Routine
tagline: Plan your week, track your meals, build your routine.
description: A lightweight, mobile-first web app for managing repeating weekly schedules and nutrition tracking. Create fixed time blocks, flexible tasks, and meal plans with macro tracking. Works without an account, with optional cloud sync across devices. No ads, no analytics, no data selling.

supportFaqs.question: Do I need an account to use the app?
supportFaqs.answer: No. All data is stored locally on your device by default. An account is only needed if you want to sync data across multiple devices.

supportFaqs.question: How do I sync my data across devices?
supportFaqs.answer: Create an account in Settings using your email and password. Your routine, meals, and settings will automatically sync to the cloud and be available on any device you sign into.

supportFaqs.question: How do I delete my data?
supportFaqs.answer: For local data, go to Settings and tap 'Reset All Data'. To delete your account and all cloud-stored data, go to Settings and tap 'Delete Account'. This is permanent and irreversible.

supportFaqs.question: How do I reset my settings?
supportFaqs.answer: Go to Settings and use the 'Reset All Data' option to clear all locally stored data and start fresh.

supportFaqs.question: Is my data private?
supportFaqs.answer: Yes. We collect no analytics, run no ads, and share no data with third parties. Your routine data is stored locally on your device and only synced to the cloud if you create an account.

dataCollected.description: Collected only if you create an account for cloud sync. Your password is hashed and never stored in plain text.
dataCollected.purpose: User authentication and account management via Supabase

dataCollected.description: Your scheduled items, categories, meals, supplements, workout plans, pantry items, and daily nutrition targets. Stored locally by default; synced to the cloud only if you create an account.
dataCollected.purpose: Core app functionality — managing your weekly routine and nutrition

dataCollected.description: Standard server logs (IP address, browser type, access timestamps) may be collected by our hosting provider Vercel.
dataCollected.purpose: Infrastructure operation and security per Vercel's platform policies

privacyPolicy.thirdPartySharing: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties. The following services are used solely for their stated purpose: Supabase (database and authentication, hosted on AWS infrastructure), Vercel (web hosting), Stripe (optional tip payments — your card details are never visible to us), and the USDA FoodData Central API (nutrition data lookups, no personal data sent).
privacyPolicy.dataRetention: Local data is stored on your device until you clear it. Cloud data is retained for as long as your account is active. You can delete your account and all associated cloud data at any time from the Settings page. Account deletion is permanent and irreversible.
privacyPolicy.userRights: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at the email below. You can also delete your account directly from the app's Settings page, which permanently removes all cloud-stored data and your authentication record.

additionalSections.title: Local Storage
additionalSections.content: This app uses browser localStorage to store your routine data, preferences, and settings on your device. This data never leaves your device unless you create an account and enable cloud sync. You can clear all local data from the Settings page.

additionalSections.title: Nutrition Label Scanning
additionalSections.content: The optional nutrition label scanner uses Tesseract.js, which runs entirely in your browser. No images or scanned data are sent to external servers — all OCR processing happens locally on your device.

additionalSections.title: Analytics & Tracking
additionalSections.content: This app does not use any analytics, tracking, or advertising services. We do not collect usage data, behavioral data, or device identifiers beyond what is described in this policy.

additionalSections.title: Payments
additionalSections.content: Optional tip payments are processed by Stripe. When you choose to leave a tip, you are redirected to Stripe's payment page. We never see or store your payment card details. Stripe's own privacy policy governs payment data.
